scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AlphaFold, ColabFold, Boltz, Chai-1, ESM, ProteinMPNN, RFdiffusion, MSA generation, structure prediction outputs, protein backbone generation, binder design, and sequence design.
scenarios.role: Use RFdiffusion for protein backbone generation workflows, including unconditional design, motif scaffolding, partial diffusion, binder design, symmetric oligomers, guided potentials, scaffold-guided design, and RFpeptides.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `rfdiffusion` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: binder design, guided potentials, macrocycle design, motif scaffolding, partial diffusion, and 3 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `rfdiffusion` when the request names `rfdiffusion`, centers on protein backbone generation workflows, including unconditional design, motif scaffolding, partial diffusion, binder design, symmetric oligomers, guided potentials, scaffold-guided design, and RFpeptides macrocycles, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in protein structure prediction and design workflows. Then route to binder design, guided potentials, macrocycle design, or motif scaffolding when those focused workflows match.
